nodes.title: Upload pre-cropped page image
nodes.description: Navigate to Glyph Machina base URL, wait for file input, set_input_files with the page image path. Failure: Playwright timeout or missing input raises GlyphMachinaError.

nodes.title: Confirm crop image
nodes.description: When Crop Image button is present, click it so pre-cropped uploads fill the frame. Success: dialog advances. Failure: timeout.

nodes.title: Run Identify Lines
nodes.description: Click the Identify Lines button; wait until the flow exposes Download Lines File. Failure: PlaywrightTimeout wrapped as GlyphMachinaError.

nodes.title: Download and save lines XML
nodes.description: Click Download Lines File, expect_download, save_as under artifacts/<job_id>/ with non-empty file. Success: Path to lines.xml. Failure: empty file or missing download.
